title: The Expert Tailor Origin
description: An origin with a special pins and a hat to go with! Mix and match pins on your special cap to gain different powers!
body:
The Expert Tailor Origin

This mod was originally for something else, but that ended up getting scrapped. I put a ton of work into this though, and I'd rather it not go to waste, so here you go. I take programming commissions, if you want something like a mod made for you at the cost of some dosh(cash), contact my discord (scriptshatter).

The Pins

You put pins on your hat and get buffs and powers. Here's a few examples to showcase what some of these do!

Fin Pin

With this pin on, you swim faster underwater!

Dwarf Pin

This pin allows you to mine entire ore veins at once! As long as you're crouching, that is.

Winter Pin

When attacking enemies with this pin on, they'll start to freeze.
